title: CBI – Special Public Prosecutor
shortInfo: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Special Public Prosecutor. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CBI official website cbi.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Special Public Prosecutor. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CBI official website cbi.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: LLB, Enrollment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council, Minimum 10 years experience at Bar in handling criminal matters in Sessions Courts

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Central Bureau of Investigation Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026
